SRJPEmodel 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Passage to Spawner Model (P2S)
    • Survival Model

Reference

Model and Submodels Functions

Functions used as to run submodels/models

BTSPAS-X

Functions to run BTSPAS-X

prepare_pCap_inputs()

Prepare inputs for pCap STAN model

prepare_abundance_inputs()

Prepare inputs for abundance model

prepare_mainstem_pCap_data()

Prepare mainstem inputs for abundance model

build_spline_data()

Prepare spline parameters object for BT-SPAS-X model

fit_pCap_model()

Fit pCap model

generate_lt_pCap_Us()

Generate lt_pCap_U values from the pCap model object

fit_abundance_model_BUGS()

Fit abundance model in BUGS.

plot_juv_data()

BT SPAS X raw data plots

generate_diagnostic_plot_juv()

BT SPAS X diagnostic plots

extract_abundance_estimates()

Extract parameter estimates from abundance BUGS model object

extract_pCap_estimates()

Extract parameter estimates from the pCap BUGS model object

run_abundance_workflow()

Run abundance BUGS workflow.

run_bt_spas_x_JPE_sites()

Run all JPE sites.

P2S

Functions to run P2S

prepare_P2S_inputs()

Prepare data for P2S

fit_passage_to_spawner_model()

Fit Passage to Spawner (P2S) STAN Model

extract_P2S_estimates()

Extract parameter estimates from P2S

generate_results_plot_p2s()

P2S results plots

Survival

Functions to run Survival Model

prepare_survival_inputs()

Prepare inputs for survival model

fit_survival_model()

Fit Survival Model

extract_survival_estimates()

Extract parameter estimates from the survival STAN model object

generate_survival_rate_plot()

Plot smolt survival rate

Stock Recruit

Functions to run Stock recruit Model

prepare_stock_recruit_inputs()

Prepare inputs for stock-recruit model

fit_stock_recruit_model()

Fit stock-recruit model in STAN

extract_stock_recruit_estimates()

Extract stock-recruit parameter estimates

generate_results_plot_sr()

Stock-recruit results plots

generate_diagnostic_plot_sr()

Stock-recruit diagnostic plots

generate_diagnostic_plot_sr_covar()

Stock-recruit diagnostic plots

Within season

Functions to run within season model

prepare_inseason_inputs()

Prepare Inputs for In-Season Model

fit_inseason_model()

Fit In-Season STAN Model

extract_inseason_estimates()

Extract Parameter Estimates from In-Season Model

generate_results_plot_inseason()

Inseason forecast plot

Model Data

Additional data beyons SRJPEdata needed to run model

bt_spas_x_bayes_params

BT-SPAS-X BUGS parameters

bt_spas_x_model_code

BT-SPAS-X STAN model code

survival_model_code

Survival model code

p2s_model_code

Passage to Spawner model code

Helper and Storage Functions

Functions used as to generate model data / format model outputs / and interface with the database

compare_P2S_model_covariates()

Compare Environmental Covariates in Passage to Spawner (P2S) Model

get_model_object()

Get Model Object

get_model_results_parameters()

Get Model Parameter Results

get_most_recent_model_objects()

Get Most Recent Model Objects

get_most_recent_model_results()

Get Most Recent Model Results

store_model_fit()

Store Model Fits

search_model_run()

Search Model Run

generate_diagnostic_plot()

Diagnostic plots

pin_model_data()

Model Data Pin
